## Description
Comprehensive README for OctoAcme project management process documentation

## Related Issue
Closes #2

## Changes
- Created `docs/README.md` as central entrypoint for all OctoAcme project management processes
- Includes overview of 5-phase lifecycle: Initiation, Planning, Execution, Release, Retrospective
- Summarizes core principles, key roles, communication cadence, and risk management approach
- Provides complete index with direct links to all 8 process documents
- Includes guidance on how to use documentation for different scenarios and roles

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes documented gap
- [x] README provides single entrypoint for all process documentation
- [x] All process documents are linked and indexed
